nasb.text: You have made known to me the ways of life; You will make me full of gladness with Your presence.’

esv.text: You have made known to me the paths of life; you will make me full of gladness with your presence.’

cnv.text: 你已經把生命之路指示了我， 必使我在你面前有滿足的喜樂。’

ccb.text: 你已把生命之路指示我， 叫我在你面前充满喜乐。’

csbs.text: 你让我明白了生命之道    ， 使我在你面前充满喜乐。’
